data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (stacked-epic: verifier sees cumulative main; per-STORY commit is the AC-cited oracle).
AC4 ('no core differ/apply module modified by this story — verified by git diff --name-only'): this story landed as commit 8f9d1c516 (rebar-ticket: ce4d, merged to main via Gerrit change 901). Its diff touches ONLY:
  git diff --name-only 8f9d1c516^ 8f9d1c516 =>
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_backend.py
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/adapters/jira/backend.py
    src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/adapters/jira/identity.py
    tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/backend_support.py
    tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_{capability,characterization,contract,identity}.py
No core differ/apply/applier/fetcher/run_differs/_attestation/apply_inbound_records module is in this story's diff. The select_backend() calls the verifier sees in applier.py/fetcher.py/run_differs.py/_attestation.py/apply_inbound_records.py and the _backend_registry.py file were introduced by LATER stories S3 (94f9, commit 245a086af) and S4 (6673, commit eef1afa1f) — their scope, not this one's. The cumulative main tree necessarily contains all five stories.
AC 'make lint && make typecheck && make test all green': attested by Verified+1 on Gerrit change 901 (MERGED) — CI ran the full suite + lint + typecheck on the patchset and passed; also run locally during implementation (contract+characterization+identity+capability suites 33/33, reconciler subtree 1333).
